<!-- fixture_expected: fail -->
<!-- fixture_failure: cutoff_status uncertain row appears in signal_rows_for_handoff -->

# Commission Signal Board Fixture: bad uncertain cutoff handoff

### 1. Commission Intake Receipt

```yaml
commission_id: fixture_bad_uncertain_cutoff
mode: backtest
candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product C
decision_context: Exercise failure when cutoff-uncertain row enters handoff.
market_or_geography: US
time_window: 2015-2020
evidence_cutoff_at: 2020-12-31
input_status: complete
missing_required_inputs: []
cutoff_rule: only source observations observable on or before 2020-12-31 may enter downstream handoff
non_goals_preserved:
  - no demand classification
```

### 4. Signal Board Rows

| Row ID | Source family | Subfamily | Surface | Observable | Signal role | Row purpose | Graph role | Graph weight hint | Evidence status | Provenance needed | Surface cutoff status | Cutoff status | Handoff note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SBR-001 | reviews | retailer reviews | PDP reviews | dated experience claims | review_experience | signal_unit | node_candidate | medium | source_backed | review URL and review date supplied | existed_by_cutoff | uncertain | Must not enter classifier handoff until cutoff is proven |

### 8. Demand-Classifier Handoff Packet

```yaml
classifier_handoff_packet:
  candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product C
  decision_context: Exercise failure when cutoff-uncertain row enters handoff.
  mode: backtest
  cutoff_date: 2020-12-31
  signal_rows_for_handoff:
    - SBR-001
  counterevidence_rows_for_handoff: []
  source_family_gaps: []
  provenance_gaps: []
  cutoff_uncertainties:
    - SBR-001 cutoff observability not yet proven.
  classifier_mapping_status: classifier_owned
  prohibited_claims:
    - no demand verdict
```
